data.content: Implementation verified for review. Artifact: branch worktree-knots-7048-lease-handoff (pushed to origin), commit 0465f3eec82a170ce23ff6cb4290ec22a0989b6e. Skills (skills/*.md + installed .claude/.agents copies) now document the lease-based identity model and the handoff-capsule workflow (kno update -H), warn against deprecated --*-agentname/model/version flags, and src/ adds kno new --lease so creation can attach a lease-authored capsule. Verified: build clean; managed_skills (33), tests_lease_ext7 (2), cli_skills (9) tests pass; prior make sanity 95.03% coverage. This capsule is authored from bound lease knots-9c89 (not [unknown]), demonstrating the delivered behavior.
